lines.text: Who are you tryin' to impress carrying all those books around?
No one, I like to read.
You can't read more than one book at a time.

Sure but you need your breakfast book that gets you going, your coffee book for when you need a little break that you secretly want to be a long break.  You got your main book that you're working on (I'm assuming that’s what you meant by one book at a time),  and then you have your comfort book for when you had a bad day and just want to dissapear on the purple line.
